title: Stone Antileak
description: A clean and simple Minecraft resource pack focused on anti-leak design.
body:
# 🔒 Antileak Pack
It changes textures of naturally generated blocks (like ores, stone variants, and similar blocks) so players **can’t use them to figure out your location**.

---

## 🧠 How it works
Minecraft worlds can sometimes be analyzed based on block patterns (like ores or stone types).  
This pack modifies those visuals, making that kind of tracking **much harder or impossible**.

---

## ✨ Features
- Modified ore textures  
- Changed stone variants (e.g. diorite, andesite, granite)  
- Focus only on world-generated blocks  
- Keeps gameplay intact while increasing privacy  

---

## 🎯 Purpose
- Prevent location finding  
- Hide location clues  
- Useful for content creators  

---

## ⚙️ Compatibility
Works with modern Minecraft versions that support resource packs.

---

## ⚠️ Important 
It’s meant as a layer of protection, not a guaranteed solution.

---

## ❤️ Support
If you like the idea, consider supporting or sharing the pack!
